keyPointsSummary: In passive voice, the object of an active sentence becomes the subject
Formula (present): am/is/are + V3; Formula (past): was/were + V3
Use 'by' to mention who performed the action (optional)
Passive is used when the action matters more than who did it

quickQuiz.hindi: यह किताब मेरे द्वारा पढ़ी जाती है।
quickQuiz.answer: This book is read by me.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह काम उसके द्वारा किया जाता है।
quickQuiz.answer: This work is done by him.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह letter उसके द्वारा लिखा गया।
quickQuiz.answer: This letter was written by her.

quickQuiz.hindi: खाना माँ के द्वारा बनाया जाता है।
quickQuiz.answer: The food is cooked by mother.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह घर मेरे दादा जी ने बनाया था।
quickQuiz.answer: This house was built by my grandfather.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह गाना उसके द्वारा गाया जाता है।
quickQuiz.answer: This song is sung by her.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह प्रश्न मेरे द्वारा पूछा गया।
quickQuiz.answer: This question was asked by me.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह फोटो मेरे द्वारा खींची जाती है।
quickQuiz.answer: This photo is taken by me.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह decision team के द्वारा लिया गया।
quickQuiz.answer: This decision was taken by the team.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह पत्र डाकिये द्वारा पहुँचाया जाता है।
quickQuiz.answer: This letter is delivered by the postman.

mustRememberRules: In passive voice, the object of an active sentence becomes the subject
Formula (present): am/is/are + V3; Formula (past): was/were + V3
Use 'by' to mention who performed the action (optional)
Passive is used when the action matters more than who did it
